panels.title: Top Correlations (click → Analyst Chat for details)
panels.description: Pairwise Pearson r between all daily metrics. * = statistically significant (p<0.05)

targets.query: from(bucket:"home-iot") |> range(start:-1h) |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._measurement=="analytics_correlation") |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value") |> keep(columns:["var1","var2","r","p_value","n","abs_r","significant","strength"]) |> sort(columns:["abs_r"],desc:true)

panels.title: Sleep Predictors (what affects your sleep?)
panels.description: Variables that predict sleep_hours. Positive r = more → more sleep. Negative = more → less sleep. (t-1) = yesterday's effect.

targets.query: from(bucket:"home-iot") |> range(start:-1h) |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._measurement=="analytics_predictor" and r._field=="r") |> keep(columns:["_value","predictor"]) |> sort(columns:["_value"],desc:true)

panels.title: Anomalies — Unusual Days
panels.description: Days where any metric deviated >2 standard deviations from the mean. High z-score = more unusual.

targets.query: from(bucket:"home-iot") |> range(start:-365d) |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._measurement=="analytics_anomaly") |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value") |> keep(columns:["_time","metric","direction","value","mean","z_score"]) |> sort(columns:["z_score"],desc:true) |> limit(n:20)

panels.title: 30-Day Trends — What's Changing?
panels.description: Recent 30 days vs prior 30 days. Positive = increasing, negative = decreasing.

targets.query: from(bucket:"home-iot") |> range(start:-1h) |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._measurement=="analytics_trend" and r._field=="change_pct") |> keep(columns:["_value","metric"]) |> sort(columns:["_value"],desc:true)

panels.title: Weekday vs Weekend
panels.description: Statistically significant differences between weekday and weekend behavior.

targets.query: from(bucket:"home-iot") |> range(start:-1h) |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._measurement=="analytics_weekday_weekend" and r._field=="diff_pct" and r.significant=="yes") |> keep(columns:["_value","metric"]) |> sort(columns:["_value"],desc:true)

panels.title: Day Type Clusters
panels.description: Your days clustered by lifestyle pattern. Which type of day do you have most?
